allow: Bash(cd "D:/work/payload" && gh issue list --repo payloadcms/payload --limit 100 --state open --json title,labels,number,author 2>&1)

Bash(cd "D:/work/payload" && gh issue list --repo payloadcms/payload --limit 200 --state open --json title,labels,number,author,created 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
# Filter for easy issues - good first label or likely/simple issues
easy_issues = []
for issue in data:
    labels = [l['name'].lower\(\) for l in issue.get\('labels', []\)]
    if 'good first issue' in labels or 'label: fix this' in labels or 'plugin: translations' in labels or 'docs' in labels:
        easy_issues.append\(issue\)
    # Also include any unlabelled or minimally labeled issues that look simple
    elif len\(labels\) <= 1 and issue['title'].lower\(\).startswith\(\('fix', 'docs', 'minor'\)\):
        easy_issues.append\(issue\)
# Sort by creation date \(oldest first - potentially simpler\)
easy_issues.sort\(key=lambda x: x['created']\)
for issue in easy_issues[:50]:
    print\(f\\"#{issue['number']}: {issue['title'][:80]}... \(labels: {', '.join\([l['name'] for l in issue['labels']]\)}\)\\"\)
" 2>/dev/null || echo "Python3 not available, trying alternative")
